calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: CACH, LLC.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Carmen Diaz as follows:
Damages $27,986.17
Prejudgment Interest $2,568.59
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $410.00, for a total of $33,789.76
Judgment signed in open court.
